tools.name: lookup
tools.description: Look up a package by name and (optionally) version number to find which versions are available and/or have vulnerabilities.

tools.name: most_recent_not_vulnerable
tools.description: Find the most recent version of a package that has no known vulnerabilities.

tools.name: is_vulnerable
tools.description: Check if a specific package version has known vulnerabilities. Requires an exact version specifier (e.g., 'requests==2.31.0').
